spec_source: browser-sniff/manual live MasterPark netParkV2 AJAX exploration
description: Unofficial CLI for MasterPark airport parking reservations, including locations, quotes, safe credential injection, profile sync, reservation dry-runs, and gated booking submission.

novel_features.name: Safe pay-at-lot reservation workflow
novel_features.description: Composes reservations from live quotes and saved profile data, stays dry-run by default, requires --submit --yes for real bookings, and no-ops under PRINTING_PRESS_VERIFY=1.

novel_features.name: Generic secret-command credential injection
novel_features.description: Supports --username-command and --password-command so 1Password or any secret manager can inject credentials without printing or persisting passwords.

novel_features.name: Saved non-secret customer and vehicle profile
novel_features.description: Logs in once and stores only non-secret customer and vehicle defaults so future reservations can fill required fields without saving a password.

novel_features.name: Fresh-booking verification caveat
novel_features.description: Documents that MasterPark's listReservations endpoint may lag or omit newly-created active reservations, so agents trust saveReservation responses and confirmation email immediately after booking.
